config.caveoverhaul.title: Cave Overhaul Settings
config.caveoverhaul.generate_caverns.too: Enable vanilla 1.18+ cavern generation. May cause terrain conflicts with Cave Overhaul's noise caves.
config.caveoverhaul.lava_offset.tooltip: Fill the bottom X air blocks of the world with lava. Adjust if bottom-of-world lava looks wrong.
config.caveoverhaul.cave_chance.tooltip: Probability that pre-1.18 style cave tunnels will spawn. (0.0 - 1.0)
config.caveoverhaul.cave_air_exposure.to: Probability that caves will carve through to the surface. (0.0 - 1.0)
Probability of canyons spawning in upper layers (y < 128 to bedrock). (0.0 - 1.0)
Probability of canyons spawning in lower layers (y < 48 to bedrock). (0.0 - 1.0)
Probability that canyons will carve through to the surface. (0.0 - 1.0)
config.caveoverhaul.ore_air_exposure_onl: Valuable ores (diamond, gold, emerald, lapis, redstone) only generate adjacent to air (cave walls). Buried ores are replaced with coal. Iron and copper are exempt.
config.caveoverhaul.ore_coal_replacement: When ores require air exposure, buried ores become coal ore instead of not generating at all.
config.caveoverhaul.debug_noise_caves.to: Toggle noise-based cavern generation. Disable to remove all noise caves.
config.caveoverhaul.debug_old_world_cave: Toggle pre-1.18 style tunnel cave generation.
Toggle canyon generation in upper layers (y < 128 to bedrock).
Toggle canyon generation in lower layers (y < 48 to bedrock).
config.caveoverhaul.debug_cave_data_logg: Log cave generation statistics (block counts, coordinates, seed) to the server log.
